mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, c.department_id, d.department_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, c.department_id, d.department_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo}

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, c.department_id, d.department_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, c.department_id, d.department_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, password, real_name, gender, class_id, email, phone, status) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{classId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, real_name = #{realName}, gender = #{gender}, class_id = #{classId}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE student SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
